action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline STGCN trained for 10 epochs, val MAE=3.3746. Training loss still decreasing but val MAE fluctuating. Model has only 200K params. Analysis: Key improvements needed: (1) Per-sensor normalization instead of global - different sensors have very different speed distributions, (2) More training epochs with early stopping, (3) Larger hidden dim for better capacity, (4) Huber loss for robustness. Decision: Implement all improvements - per-sensor normalization, hidden_dim=256, Huber loss, 50 epochs with patience=10 early stopping, warmup + cosine schedule. Also submit current baseline eval to get test score.
